name: Google Spotlight Stories: Son of Jaguar
short_description: Emmy Award-winning platform, Google Spotlight Stories, presents Son of Jaguar VR. In the most important match of his life, the once mighty masked luchador, Son of Jaguar, faces his legacy, his family, and what it means to be a part of something bigger than himself. Directed by Jorge Gutierrez.
detailed_description:
Emmy Award-winning platform, Google Spotlight Stories, presents Son of Jaguar VR. In the most important match of his life, the once mighty masked luchador, Son of Jaguar, faces his legacy, his family, and what it means to be a part of something bigger than himself.

Directed by Jorge Gutierrez, creator and director The Book of Life.
Produced by Google Spotlight Stories with Reel FX
about_the_game:
